## Summary
Adds manuscript selector UX in Agent Readiness to improve source selection before readiness actions.

## Why
This branch contains active UX work that is not yet in \ and should be reviewed/merged via PR.

## Scope
- Agent Readiness client UX only.
- No database or job contract changes.

## Notes
Branch was rebased onto current \ before opening this PR to avoid stale regressions from older content branches.
